title: Spartan Shields Unofficial
description: An unofficial NeoForge 1.21.1 port of the iconic Spartan Shields mod—This mod adds a variety of shields with unique abilities and effects, including basic shields, tower shields, and special modded shields.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1356601495289729034?label=Discord&logo=discord&color=7289DA)](https://discord.gg/ASVG5n5xAg)

# 🛡️ Spartan Shields Unofficial (NeoForge)

**An unofficial community port of [Spartan Shields](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-shields) for Minecraft 1.21.1.**

Since the original author (ObliviousSp) has been inactive for over six months, this project adapts the original Spartan Shields code to **NeoForge 1.21.1**, bringing the diverse and unique shield mechanics from the original mod to the latest Minecraft version.

## ✨ Features

*   **Diverse Shield Arsenal:** Adds a rich variety of specialized shields (Heavy Shields, Elemental Shields, Faction-specific Shields, etc.) with distinct designs and use cases.
*   **Unique Blocking Mechanics:** Custom shield attributes including variable damage reduction, knockback resistance, retaliatory damage, and specialized block effects.
*   **Material Support:** Full compatibility with vanilla materials and common modded ores (Copper, Tin, Bronze, Steel, etc.) for shield crafting and upgrades.
*   **Modernized:** Specifically rebuilt for the **NeoForge** ecosystem on **1.21.1**, ensuring stability and compatibility with the latest modding standards.

## 🛠️ Requirements & Compat

*   **Platform:** NeoForge 1.21.1
*   **Recommended Mods:** 
    *   [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) (For additional equipment slots, if applicable)
    *   [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) / [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) (To view crafting recipes)

## 📜 Credits & License

*   **Original Author:** [ObliviousSp](https://www.curseforge.com/members/oblivioussp)
*   **Ported by:** Mai_xiyu & Claude AI
*   **License:** Apache-2.0

⚠️ **Note:** This is an **unofficial** fork. Please report bugs here on the project page, **NOT** to the original author's page.
